name: Anyang Iron and Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: AnYang Iron & Steel Inc. produces and sells steel and coking chemical products. Its products include heavy plates, furnace coils, hot rolled coils, and wires and small and medium-sized materials. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Anyang, China. AnYang Iron & Steel Inc. is a subsidiary of Anyang Iron & Steel Group Co., Ltd.
